data.title: Tesla Exec Confirms Roadster Update Talks, Collaboration With SpaceX For Top Specs
data.description: Tesla Inc executive Lars Moravy said in an interview published on Sunday that the company is indeed working with Elon Musk's rocket manufacturing company SpaceX for its upcoming Roadster vehicle.

data.title: NIH Funding Cuts To Spook Healthcare Stocks? RFK Jr's Confirmation At HHS Sparks Concerns Over Research Dollars, 'Causing Uncertainty,' Says Analyst
data.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s appointment as Secretary of Health and Human Services has sparked concerns over funding for the NIH.

data.title: Elon Musk's DOGE Savings Of $55 Billion May Be Overstated — WSJ Analysis Reveals The Likely Actual Figure
data.description: The Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), overseen by Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk, has been found to overstate its savings from federal spending cuts.

data.title: Trump Reportedly Warns Big Pharma: Move Manufacturing To US Or Face Tariffs
data.description: President Donald Trump has issued a stringent warning to pharmaceutical companies, advising them to repatriate their manufacturing to the US or face the possibility of tariffs.

data.title: Apple's M4 MacBook Air Set For March Debut, Says Top Analyst — New 13-Inch And 15-Inch Models Reportedly Incoming
data.description: Apple is reportedly set to launch new 13-inch and 15-inch MacBook Air models with M4 chips in March, as inventory reductions and internal preparations signal an imminent release.
